name: Spokeo

optOut.leaveItGuidance: Low-reach listing. If your current<->former name link isn't already here, submitting it reveals the connection to Spokeo. Consider leaving it and monitoring instead.
steps: Find your listing via the search URL.
Submit it on the opt-out page with your email.

notes: Re-check in ~6 months; brokers often re-list.
attribution: Derived from Big-Ass Data Broker Opt-Out List (CC BY-NC-SA).
